title: Fix false positives in cursor-based audit compliance reads
Align fab_update_registry priority input with agents.meta schema
Stop MCP transport events from breaking ledger-append dedupe
Dispose HTTP cache watchers on server shutdown
Exposed rc6 gate is stale against current hook/config files
description: The root package still exposes `pnpm rc6:gate`, but the gate re-runs a stale rc5 anchor and checks current files against outdated assumptions. With build/tests skipped, it fails on rc5 legacy checks, missing Cursor SessionStart/PreToolUse slots, and a deleted `packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts` path before it can provide a useful release signal. This makes the named gate misleading and likely to be bypassed rather than trusted.
fix_direction: Either retire rc5:gate/rc6:gate from package.json, or update rc6 checks to current hook config ownership and command files, then add a lightweight test/CI assertion that exposed gate scripts execute successfully with FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_BUILD=1 and FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_TESTS=1.

context.notes: Discovered by prompt inconsistency sweep DBP-20260609-023700

issue_history.note: Discovered by prompt inconsistency sweep DBP-20260609-023700
Closed: rc5/rc6 (and rc2-rc4) coverage-gate scripts retired; superseded by release-rc skill.

resolution: Retired the per-rc coverage-gate pattern: deleted scripts/rc2..rc6-coverage-gate.mjs (all 5), removed rc5:gate + rc6:gate from root package.json scripts, un-pinned rc6:gate from scripts/test-strategy-gate.mjs required-scripts list, and updated docs/TESTING.md (Commands list + Scenario Matrix Release-drift-gate row now point to the release-rc skill). The per-rc gate pattern died at rc6 and was superseded by the release-rc skill; matches the issue fix_direction. Migrate-before-delete node sweep (KT-PIT-0035) confirmed no live references remained (only .workflow/ historical artifacts, which do not count). pnpm test:strategy PASS and pnpm lint (knip --strict) clean post-change.

Fixed on main 99077998: cli-surface snapshot includes doctor --probe. CI green after snapshot update.

wontfix_product_rule: cite auto-accounting path-overlap is intentional (session-scoped + path overlap); agents should recall with paths matching edit targets — document in bootstrap AGENTS cite policy

summary: quoteRelevancePath escapes backslash/quote/control chars before YAML scalar wrap (extract-knowledge.ts).
whoami removed; store/sync/metrics/info route through getProjectTranslator/t i18n catalogs.
CLI locale is machine-wide resolveGlobalLocale (fabric-global.json language); getProjectTranslator no longer OS-env only.
install scaffold emits cli.install.scanning / scan-complete on stderr TTY around buildForensicReport (ISS-035).

stable_id_collision / layer_mismatch remediations now point at fabric-review modify with concrete ids (i18n remediation keys).

underseed_node_threshold already configurable; NARROW_RATIO/SILENCE_RATE/SESSION_HINTS remain code constants — defer config surface expansion.
stale serve.lock unlink now treats EACCES/EPERM as manual_error without aborting runDoctorFix.

session-digest-writer redacts user_messages via shared redactSecrets before write (path-overlap note: size cap still applies).
extractKnowledge secret scan includes recent_paths, tech_stack, impact alongside evidence_paths/tags/text fields.

title: [correctness] readLedger full-file→256KB tail breaks behavior-preserving split
description: ledger-scan.readLedger now calls eventReader.readRecentEvents (256KB tail) instead of main-branch full events.jsonl read + partial-tail drop. Stop-hook archive/backlog/import/maintenance signals silently lose older ledger events on large ledgers.
fix_direction: Restore full-file readLedger semantics in ledger-scan (or explicit full-read API used by fabric-hint); keep tail helper only for intentional bounded readers.

context.suggested_fix: Port main-branch full readFileSync + trailing-newline pop into ledger-scan.readLedger

title: [security] transcript_path unsandboxed arbitrary file read in summarizeTranscript
description: transcript-summary.summarizeTranscript reads stdin transcript_path with no root/realpath allowlist; content can flow to digests/events.
fix_direction: Allowlist absolute paths under known client transcript roots; realpath prefix check; size/suffix limits.

context.notes: Pre-existing risk relocated with extract; still high

title: [correctness] Archive value-gate uses sessionAnchorTs instead of sessionArchiveWatermark
description: Never-archived session: sessionAnchorTs=first activity ts; isHighValueArchiveCandidate uses strict e.ts>wm so first-activity-ts high-value events are excluded. countBacklogSessions correctly uses sessionArchiveWatermark(null→0).
fix_direction: Use sessionArchiveWatermark(events, sid) for value-gate; keep sessionAnchorTs for mutation counting only.

context.suggested_fix: Use sessionArchiveWatermark(events, sid) for value-gate; keep sessionAnchorTs for mutation counting only.
context.notes: In-session archive nudge can stay quiet despite edit threshold + high-value first event.

resolution: fixed: archive value-gate uses sessionArchiveWatermark (null→0), not sessionAnchorTs. Evidence: verification-fixloop + review COR-010 RESOLVED; fabric-hint ISS-043 tests.

title: [security] FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS can fully disable ISS-041 sandbox
description: 生产路径无条件信任 FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS。未要求绝对路径、未拒绝 '/'。本地复现：FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS='/' 时任意绝对 .jsonl 可读出 user_messages。
fix_direction: 仅 NODE_ENV=test / FABRIC_TEST=1 启用 seam；否则忽略 env。启用时强制 isAbsolute 且拒绝 filesystem root。

context.suggested_fix: 仅 NODE_ENV=test / FABRIC_TEST=1 启用 seam；否则忽略 env。启用时强制 isAbsolute 且拒绝 filesystem root。
context.notes: 测试 seam 在生产可一键旁路 allowlist，任意 .jsonl 可经 Stop hook 进入 digest/cite 管线。

resolution: fixed: FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS test-seam gated + refuse filesystem root `/`. Evidence: verification-fixloop + review SEC-001 RESOLVED.

issue_history.note: closed by ralph-v2 residual clearance + review fix-loop; evidence: .workflow/scratch/20260713-plan-residual-registered-036-041/verification.json, verification-fixloop.json, .workflow/scratch/20260713-review-P1-fixloop-042-045/review.json

title: [security] TOCTOU: allow 校验后用原始路径 readFileSync
description: isAllowed 对 realpath 做 root/size 校验，随后按原始 path 打开。窗口期内路径可被替换为 symlink。静态 symlink-to-outside 在当前实现下被 realpath 挡住，但 check-then-use 窗口仍在。
fix_direction: open+fstat / 仅读 realpath 结果；O_NOFOLLOW 或 lstat 拒绝 symlink；size 以 fd fstat 为准。

context.suggested_fix: open+fstat / 仅读 realpath 结果；O_NOFOLLOW 或 lstat 拒绝 symlink；size 以 fd fstat 为准。
context.notes: 本地可写 allowlisted 目录时可竞态劫持读取内容进入 digest。

resolution: fixed: summarizeTranscript reads validated realpath only (no TOCTOU original path). Evidence: verification-fixloop + review SEC-002 RESOLVED.
